results.title: AUA/ASTRO 2022 Guidelines: "Scrutinized".
results.snippet:
PubMed ID: 36882350. 2023/05/01 00:00. PURPOSE: To provide guidance to clinicians regarding therapy for patients with 
brain metastases from solid tumors.
METHODS: ASCO convened an Expert Panel and conducted a systematic review of the 
literature.
RESULTS: Thirty-two randomized trials published in 2008 or later met eligibility 
criteria and form the primary evidentiary base.
RECOMMENDATIONS: Surgery is a reasonable option for patients with brain 
metastases. Patients with large tumors with mass
